testcase.name: class_array_references

failure.message:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Output mismatch for test 'class_array_references'. Kotlin stdout: 10 25 37
C++ stdout: 10 20 30 ==> expected: <10 25 37> but was: <10 20 30>

testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Output mismatch for test 'class_array_references'. Kotlin stdout: 10 25 37
C++ stdout: 10 20 30 ==> expected: <10 25 37> but was: <10 20 30> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1156) at app//transpiler.TranspilerTest.runTest(TranspilerTest.kt:99) at app//transpiler.TranspilerTest.allTests$lambda$3$lambda$2(TranspilerTest.kt:41) at java.base@11.0.30/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:183) at java.base@11.0.30/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) at java.base@11.0.30/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541)

testcase.name: example_dynamic_diameter
